item.title: JamesPearceLFC: James Pearce @JamesPearceLFC · 2min "We are close to an agreement. I have a special relationship not only with the fans,
item.description: James Pearce @JamesPearceLFC · 2min "We are close to an agreement. I have a special relationship not only with the fans, but with every single person who works at the club. This club means so much to me.” Ibrahima Konate reveals he's set to sign a new long-term contract at Liverpool. De nytimes.com 9 18 110 1 mil

item.description:

item.title: footballontnt: Football on TNT Sports @footballontnt · 3min Brighton's Fabian Hürzeler discusses what it's like being a manager who is
item.description:
Football on TNT Sports @footballontnt · 3min Brighton's Fabian Hürzeler discusses what it's like being a manager who is younger than some of his players, the importance of data in modern football, as well as much more in our latest episode of 'Inside the Game'
To watch in full: https:// youtube.com/watch?v=xe5r3K YWVsg … 7 3 11 1 mil
